overview: Employee Performance Dashboard for Frootle India Pvt. Ltd. — a full-stack analytics platform tracking sales, attendance, feedback, surveys, SWOT analysis, and team performance. Connected live to Google Sheets for real-time data sync.
features: Excel export for all dashboard sections respecting active filters
Feedback tab with Issue Insights Dashboard and Region Analysis
Sales Trends with multi-year comparison and product performance
Employee profiles with personality pentagon, SWOT, Lapses, PULSE/PRISM
Regional Analysis drill-down with employee, sales, and feedback breakdowns
Live Google Sheets backend with dynamic column mapping
